title: KIRE-002 41-year-old Mariko Sada AV DEBUT, an active beautician who has both "beauty" and "smartness"
description: The birth of the new label "Rei" -KIREI SOD-, in which the most beautiful and adult women in SOD history appear on their own. Mariko Sada, who decided to appear in an AV to polish herself while running a beauty salon, is also stoic for work and sex! As a woman, keep an eye on her lustrous body that wants to keep shining and her open and passionate sex ...!
